issues.description: Condition is 'Always' but card text specifies two conditions: (1) 'If you have 2 or less Life cards' AND (2) 'your Leader's type includes "Whitebeard Pirates"'. Should be a compound condition checking both TurnCount/Life state and LeaderHasType.
Trigger is 'Activated' but this is a static/passive ability that checks conditions continuously, not an activated ability. Should be 'Trigger' or 'OnPlay' depending on intended behavior.
Duration is 'EndOfTurn' but [Rush] from this effect should persist for the turn the card is played (permanent during that turn). Should be 'DuringYourTurn' or 'Permanent' depending on design intent.
